absorption: Sellers are hitting the bids around the vPOC (61310-61320), but the price is not breaking down despite consistent negative delta, indicating strong passive buyers (BID absorption).
dom_observation: Significant ask liquidity sits above 61400. Bids are holding firm around 61300 despite selling pressure.
reasoning: Fiyat, vPOC seviyesinde negatif deltaya ragmen dusmeyi basaramiyor; bu durum saticilarin pasif alicilar tarafindan absorbe edildigini gosteren guclu bir long sinyalidir.
